mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PORTFOLIO_HOLDINGS (PORTFOLIOID, INSTRUMENTID, QUANTITY) VALUES (#{portfolioId}, #{instrumentId}, #{quantity})
mapper.update: UPDATE PORTFOLIO_HOLDINGS SET QUANTITY = #{quantity} WHERE PORTFOLIOID = #{portfolioId} AND INSTRUMENTID = #{instrumentId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PORTFOLIO_HOLDINGS WHERE PORTFOLIOID = #{portfolioId} AND INSTRUMENTID = #{instrumentId}
